clinic.name: SHIUSH CLINICS
clinic.tagline: Health is the root of happiness

doctor.name: Dr. Nitish Shukla
doctor.title: General Physician
doctor.bio: Dr. Nitish Shukla is a compassionate and experienced General Physician committed to providing quality healthcare to all. With a focus on preventive medicine and patient-centered care, he combines modern diagnostics with a personal approach to wellness — ensuring every patient feels heard and respected.

hero.description: Expert healthcare led by Dr. Nitish Shukla, MBBS — providing compassionate consultations, preventive care, and chronic condition management for the Bhilai community.

about.title: Welcome to SHIUSH Clinics
about.subtitle: We are dedicated to providing compassionate and professional healthcare to our community. From routine checkups to chronic condition management, we're here for you.

services.name: General Consultation
services.desc: Diagnosis and treatment for fever, infections, cold, flu, and common ailments.

services.name: Chronic Disease Management
services.desc: Ongoing care and monitoring for diabetes, hypertension, and other long-term conditions.

services.name: Preventive Healthcare
services.desc: Routine checkups, health screenings, and vaccinations to keep you healthy.

services.name: Video Consultation
services.desc: Consult Dr. Shukla from the comfort of your home. Just ₹500 per session.

services.name: Online Messaging
services.desc: Quick health queries answered via WhatsApp or message. Just ₹100.

services.name: Burn & Wound Care
services.desc: Expert treatment and follow-up for burns, wounds, and post-injury recovery.

faq.question: 🕐 What are your consultation timings?
faq.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We are closed on Sundays. For emergency queries, please WhatsApp us.

faq.question: 💰 What are the consultation fees?
faq.answer: ₹100 for online messaging consultations and ₹500 for video consultations. In-person fees may vary — please call us for details.

faq.question: 📋 Do I need to bring any documents?
faq.answer: Please bring any previous prescriptions and recent medical reports if available. This helps Dr. Shukla provide a more accurate diagnosis and personalized treatment plan.

faq.question: 📹 How do I do a video consultation?
faq.answer: Book an appointment via the form above or WhatsApp us at 8305194236. We’ll send you a video call link at your confirmed appointment time.

faq.question: 📍 Where are you located?
faq.answer: We are located at Link Road Camp 2, Bhilai, Chhattisgarh. You can also email us at shuklanitish762@gmail.com for directions.

warrior.name: Ayush
warrior.story: Ayush, a 7-year-old boy, came to SHIUSH Clinics after suffering severe burns. Through expert care and compassionate, personalized treatment by Dr. Nitish Shukla, he has made a truly remarkable recovery.
warrior.quote: “His story is a true testament to the healing power of modern medicine and personalized care. We are proud of our brave little warrior.” — Dr. Nitish Shukla

news.title: Free Medical Checkup Camp at SHIUSH Clinic!
news.body: Join us tomorrow for a free medical checkup camp open to all community members. No prior appointment needed.

news.title: 50% Discount on All Lab Tests During the Camp
news.body: During the health camp, avail 50% off on all routine lab tests including blood work, sugar levels, and more.
news.meta: 🏷️ Limited time offer  ·  Valid during camp only

news.title: Video Consultations Now Available 6 Days a Week
news.body: Dr. Shukla is now available for video consultations Monday through Saturday. Book your slot at just ₹500 per session.
